Django News Capstone

Contents Home News App Users App
Indices General Index Module Index

News App

Models

news.models

Defines Category and Article models for the news capstone.

class news.models.Category

Represents a news category (e.g. Technology, Sport, Politics).

Fields:

  • name — CharField(max_length=100, unique=True)
  • description — TextField(blank=True, null=True)
  • created_at — DateTimeField(auto_now_add=True)
__str__()

Returns the category name.

class news.models.Article

Represents a news article written by a user and belonging to a category.

Fields:

  • title — CharField(max_length=255)
  • content — TextField
  • author — ForeignKey(CustomUser, on_delete=CASCADE)
  • category — ForeignKey(Category, on_delete=SET_NULL, null=True)
  • status — CharField — choices: draft | published
  • created_at — DateTimeField(auto_now_add=True)
  • updated_at — DateTimeField(auto_now=True)
__str__()

Returns the article title.

Views

news.views

Provides full CRUD for Articles and Categories via the REST API.

class news.views.CategoryListCreateView

Handles listing all categories and creating new ones.

  • GET /api/news/categories/ — List all categories
  • POST /api/news/categories/ — Create a new category
class news.views.CategoryDetailView

Handles retrieve, update, and delete operations for a single category.

  • GET /api/news/categories/<id>/ — Retrieve a category
  • PUT /api/news/categories/<id>/ — Update a category
  • DELETE /api/news/categories/<id>/ — Delete a category
class news.views.ArticleListCreateView

Handles listing all articles and creating new ones. Supports search and ordering.

  • GET /api/news/articles/ — List all articles (supports ?search= and ?ordering=)
  • POST /api/news/articles/ — Create a new article
class news.views.ArticleDetailView

Handles retrieve, update, and delete operations for a single article.

  • GET /api/news/articles/<id>/ — Retrieve an article
  • PUT /api/news/articles/<id>/ — Update an article
  • DELETE /api/news/articles/<id>/ — Delete an article

Serializers

news.serializers

class news.serializers.CategorySerializer

Serializer for the Category model. Fields: id, name, description, created_at.

class news.serializers.ArticleSerializer

Serializer for the Article model. Includes read-only author_username and category_name fields. Automatically assigns the logged-in user as the article author on creation.

create(validated_data)

Automatically assigns the logged-in user as the author.
